title: Classic American Broccoli Bake
description: A comforting and easy-to-make dish that's perfect for a weeknight dinner. This broccoli bake is a twist on the classic American comfort food.
instructions: Steam broccoli florets until tender. Set aside.
In a separate saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of shredded fluffy to the saucepan and stir until golden brown.
In a separate bowl, mix together 1 cup of shredded american and 1 cup of shredded bake.
Add the steamed broccoli to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the broccoli mixture to a baking dish.
Top with the remaining 1/2 cup of shredded bake.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
